calendarScript.CRITICAL_FIX: Script has -1 day offset baked in. Microsoft Graph + Pacific/Auckland has timezone bug that shifts dates +1 day. DO NOT CHANGE THIS. Just pass the date you want and it will appear correctly.

outlook.note: Microsoft Graph API - full calendar access. ALWAYS use scripts/outlook-calendar.js for ALL calendar operations. The -1 day fix is permanent.
